package.name: phone_imu_bridge
package.description: Phone-based Inertial Navigation Unit (INU) for a DSP course project. Streams IMU data from a phone accelerometer/gyroscope via HTTP, applies Madgwick sensor fusion, Butterworth IIR filtering, and trapezoidal numerical integration to estimate orientation, velocity, and displacement in real-time. Includes a web dashboard for visualisation and spectral analysis (FFT/PSD) for noise characterisation.
